name: The Needle
effect: Declare that metrics must improve. This card is considered urgent.

clauses.name: DIRECTIONAL CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the needle is invoked: All teams are considered responsible for moving it.

clauses.name: NEEDLE DEFINITION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If pressed on which metric: The needle is redefined to one that has already moved.

clauses.name: MOMENTUM PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the needle does not move: The initiative is considered to be building momentum.

witness_quote: We really need to move the needle.
